cvData.summary: Results-driven Mechanical Engineer with 4+ years of progressive experience spanning site mechanical supervision, QA/QC inspection, and systems engineering across Saudi Arabia's industrial and commercial sectors. Proven track record delivering Aramco-affiliated projects in full conformance with ISO 9001, ASME, and API standards, with hands-on proficiency in SolidWorks, AutoCAD, and MATLAB. Licensed member of the Saudi Council of Engineers with NEBOSH IGC certification, combining deep QA/QC discipline with multidisciplinary coordination capabilities to drive zero-defect project delivery at scale.

experience.title: Audiovisual Engineer
bullets: Architect end-to-end integrated systems—audio, video, lighting, and unified control platforms—translating client functional requirements into signal-flow drawings, equipment schedules, and full handover documentation for corporate and commercial deployments.

Engineered a real-time heartbeat visualization system for a medical training manikin by integrating EMS telemetry with live charting dashboards, enabling clinical teams to interpret patient vitals and make decisions 3× faster than baseline.

Commission LED video walls, digital signage, conferencing codecs, microphone arrays, and speaker systems across smart meeting rooms, boardrooms, and large-format venues, sustaining 99%+ uptime post-deployment.
Orchestrate cross-functional coordination with IT, facilities, and client stakeholders to resolve interface clashes and ensure seamless enterprise network integration across all deployed AV estates.
Execute preventive maintenance programs, fault diagnosis workflows, and firmware upgrade cycles, reducing unplanned downtime incidents across the managed AV portfolio.

experience.title: Site Mechanical Engineer
bullets: Supervised mechanical installation works on Aramco-affiliated drilling sites, enforcing full conformance to approved engineering drawings, Aramco engineering standards, and HSE regulations throughout all construction phases.

Inspected and cleared site conditions prior to drilling mobilization—verifying ground stability, equipment readiness, and safety barrier integrity—eliminating schedule slippage risk and preventing recordable incidents.
Coordinated daily between civil, electrical, and instrumentation teams, subcontractors, and suppliers to resolve interface clashes and maintain construction sequencing across concurrent work fronts.

Reviewed and interpreted mechanical drawings, isometrics, P&IDs, and technical specifications; issued structured daily and weekly progress reports to project management, maintaining full schedule transparency.
Verified material deliveries against approved specifications and logged non-conformance reports (NCRs) for corrective action, ensuring zero non-conforming materials entered service.

experience.title: QA/QC Engineer
bullets: Enforced project-wide compliance with ISO 9001, ASME, and API standards across vendor facilities and client project sites, documenting all findings in structured inspection reports and driving timely corrective-action close-out.
Developed and implemented best-practice QA/QC procedures for product development and lifting-equipment certification programs, measurably reducing rework rates on flagged non-conforming items.

Conducted load testing, visual inspection, and NDT coordination for mobile cranes, offshore containers, shackles, eyebolts, and all classes of lifting slings prior to release for service, ensuring 100% traceability.
Audited vendor workshops and field installations, issued non-conformance reports, and verified timely close-out of corrective actions in alignment with client and regulatory requirements.
Reviewed ITPs, WPS/PQRs, and material test certificates to validate full traceability and standards conformance before equipment deployment on regulated project sites.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Mechanical Engineering
achievements: Senior Design Project — Class Winner: Led multidisciplinary team in designing and implementing a process-optimization solution for Dickies Seafood Company (Richmond, VA), selected as top project in the graduating class.
Research Internship — Smart Lab Materials: Conducted hands-on investigation of advanced material behavior under varied loading conditions, contributing findings to departmental research.
Engineering Visualization: Designed and modeled a full 3D industrial tank assembly in SolidWorks, producing manufacturing-ready technical drawings to industry standards.

certifications.name: NEBOSH International General Certificate (IGC) in Occupational Health and Safety
ISO Internal Auditor — Quality Management Systems

achievements: Engineered a medical-manikin heartbeat visualization system with live EMS telemetry integration, reducing clinical decision time by 3× for medical training teams.
Awarded top Senior Design Project at Old Dominion University for process-optimization work delivered for Dickies Seafood Company, selected from the full graduating class cohort.
Licensed by the Saudi Council of Engineers, qualifying for supervisory mechanical engineering roles across the Kingdom's regulated industrial and energy-sector projects.
Maintained 100% material traceability and zero non-conforming-material-in-service incidents across QA/QC inspection scope at APPLUS+ VELOSI.
